CustomField.description: This field is used to track the "Memo" on the custom UI(Generate NetSuite Order button on Quote) when we are processing the Order through NetSuite Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used to track the "Memo" on the custom UI(Generate NetSuite Order button on Quote) when we are processing the Order through NetSuite Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.label: Memo
